Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion Seeking Court Approval For Serving Defendant Through The Director Of The Dmv Or Allowing Plaintiff To Serve Defendant Through The Director Of Dmv
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF NOAH AMPOFO's Motion Seeking Court Approval To Serve Defendant Through The Director Of The DMV.

The court grants the unopposed motion permitting plaintiff Noah Ampofo to serve defendant Manish Phogat pursuant to Vehicle Code, sections 17451 et seq., by service on the director of the Department of Motor Vehicles, as expressly provided in Vehicle Code, section 17451.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
